robot_mascot:
<svg viewBox="0 0 400 280" width="100%">
  <!-- Robot Body (Rectangle) -->
  <rect x="150" y="100" width="100" height="100" rx="10" ry="10" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1976D2" stroke-width="3"/>

  <!-- Robot Head (Rounded Rectangle) -->
  <rect x="160" y="50" width="80" height="60" rx="10" ry="10" fill="#4CAF50" stroke="#388E3C" stroke-width="3"/>

  <!-- Antennae -->
  <line x1="180" y1="50" x2="180" y2="30" stroke="#FF9800" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <circle cx="180" cy="25" r="7" fill="#FF9800" stroke="#F57C00" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="220" y1="50" x2="220" y2="30" stroke="#FF9800" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <circle cx="220" cy="25" r="7" fill="#FF9800" stroke="#F57C00" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- Eyes -->
  <circle cx="185" cy="75" r="8" fill="white" stroke="#333333" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="215" cy="75" r="8" fill="white" stroke="#333333" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="185" cy="75" r="3" fill="#333333"/>
  <circle cx="215" cy="75" r="3" fill="#333333"/>

  <!-- Mouth -->
  <path d="M185,95 Q200,105 215,95" stroke="#E91E63" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>

  <!-- Arms -->
  <rect x="130" y="110" width="20" height="60" rx="5" ry="5" fill="#FF9800" stroke="#F57C00" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="250" y="110" width="20" height="60" rx="5" ry="5" fill="#FF9800" stroke="#F57C00" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- Legs -->
  <rect x="165" y="200" width="20" height="40" rx="5" ry="5" fill="#FF9800" stroke="#F57C00" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="215" y="200" width="20" height="40" rx="5" ry="5" fill="#FF9800" stroke="#F57C00" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- Speech Bubble -->
  <path d="M260,60 Q280,40 320,40 Q360,40 360,80 Q360,120 320,120 Q280,120 260,100 L260,80 Z"
        fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#333333" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="310" y="87" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="#333333" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">You've got this!</text>
</svg>

problem_visuals.svg_code:
<svg viewBox="0 0 300 250" width="100%">
  <!-- Grid lines and cells -->
  <!-- H column -->
  <rect x="50" y="20" width="50" height="40" fill="#E0F7FA" stroke="#B2EBF2" stroke-width="1"/>
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="50" height="40" fill="#F3F3F3" stroke="#D0D0D0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <rect x="50" y="100" width="50" height="40" fill="#F3F3F3" stroke="#D0D0D0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <rect x="50" y="150" width="50" height="40" fill="#F3F3F3" stroke="#D0D0D0" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- T column -->
  <rect x="100" y="20" width="50" height="40" fill="#E0F7FA" stroke="#B2EBF2" stroke-width="1"/>
  <rect x="100" y="60" width="50" height="40" fill="#F3F3F3" stroke="#D0D0D0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <rect x="100" y="100" width="50" height="40" fill="#F3F3F3" stroke="#D0D0D0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <rect x="100" y="150" width="50" height="40" fill="#F3F3F3" stroke="#D0D0D0" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- O column -->
  <rect x="150" y="20" width="50" height="40" fill="#E0F7FA" stroke="#B2EBF2" stroke-width="1"/>
  <rect x="150" y="60" width="50" height="40" fill="#F3F3F3" stroke="#D0D0D0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <rect x="150" y="100" width="50" height="40" fill="#F3F3F3" stroke="#D0D0D0" stroke-width="1"/>
  <rect x="150" y="150" width="50" height="40" fill="#F3F3F3" stroke="#D0D0D0" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- Column Headers H T O -->
  <text x="75" y="47" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="#2196F3" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">H</text>
  <text x="125" y="47" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="#2196F3" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">T</text>
  <text x="175" y="47" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="18" fill="#2196F3" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">O</text>

  <!-- First number: 345 -->
  <text x="75" y="87" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" fill="#333333" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">3</text>
  <text x="125" y="87" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" fill="#333333" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">4</text>
  <text x="175" y="87" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" fill="#333333" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">5</text>

  <!-- Operator and Second number: - 2 -->
  <text x="75" y="127" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" fill="#E91E63" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">-</text>
  <text x="175" y="127" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" fill="#333333" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">2</text>

  <!-- Separator line -->
  <line x1="50" y1="140" x2="200" y2="140" stroke="#333333" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- Answer row - use '?' for blanks -->
  <text x="75" y="177" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" fill="#AAAAAA" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">?</text>
  <text x="125" y="177" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" fill="#AAAAAA" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">?</text>
  <text x="175" y="177" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" fill="#AAAAAA" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">?</text>
</svg>
problem_visuals.description: A vertical subtraction grid showing 345 minus 2, with place value columns H, T, O, and empty cells marked with '?' for the answer.
